title: Image viewer component with download and metadata display
purpose: Displays selected image with metadata and download functionality, handling loading errors and formatting file sizes and dates.
module_context: Exports a React functional component ImageViewer that uses Zustand for state management and includes helper functions for formatting file sizes and dates.

steps.content: Return '0 B' if the byte count is zero.
Calculate the appropriate size unit (B, KB, MB, GB) based on the byte count.
Format the size value to one decimal place for units greater than bytes, or zero decimal places for bytes.
Combine the formatted size value with its unit and return the result.
Convert the ISO date string into a JavaScript Date object.
Format the date into a readable string with year, month, day, hour, and minute in US locale.
Initialize state to track image loading errors.
Extract current session, images, and selected image ID from the session store.
Find the selected image in the images collection.
IF no image or session exists, display a message indicating no image is selected.
ELSE construct the API URL for the image content with project and session parameters.
Render the image viewer UI with title, download link, image display area, and metadata.
IF an image error occurs, display a failure message instead of the image.
ELSE display the image with error handling to set the error state if loading fails.
